description: Synthetic HL7 v2.3 ORU^R01 batch from a RAYTO RAC-050 with two OBR specimen groups. Proves that each OBX remains attributed to its own accession instead of collapsing onto the first order. NOT a real instrument capture.

source.note: Application payload only. The two OBR records are distinct specimen boundaries; each owns the OBX records that follow it until the next OBR.
